name: TabbedOut
description: Lowers FPS and can mute audio while Geometry Dash is unfocused.

limit-fps-when-unfocused.name: Limit FPS When Unfocused
limit-fps-when-unfocused.description: Drops the game's frame rate while the window is unfocused.

unfocused-fps.name: Unfocused FPS
unfocused-fps.description: Target FPS while Geometry Dash is tabbed out.

mute-audio-when-unfocused.name: Mute Audio When Unfocused
mute-audio-when-unfocused.description: Pauses all audio while the game is unfocused.
